activities.description: Navigation, trail discipline, survival routines, fitness, and environmental awareness.

activities.description: Student volunteer mobilization with campus health partners and donor care teams.

activities.title: Community Welfare Projects
activities.description: Cleanups, food drives, flood relief support, awareness walks, and local outreach.

activities.title: Leadership Workshops
activities.description: Communication, event command, patrol management, public speaking, and ethics.

activities.title: University Event Management
activities.description: Protocol, crowd guidance, ceremonial duty, reception lines, and campus logistics.

activities.title: National Scout Competitions
activities.description: Drill, camping, knots, rescue simulation, quiz, and leadership challenge teams.

activities.title: Environmental Campaigns
activities.description: Tree plantation, campus cleanliness, water conservation, and climate awareness.
